mapper.select: SELECT * FROM slaughter_records ORDER BY event_time DESC
SELECT * FROM slaughter_records WHERE ear_tag = #{earTag} ORDER BY event_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO slaughter_records (ear_tag, event_time, type, destination, weight, price) VALUES (#{earTag}, #{eventTime}, #{type}, #{destination}, #{weight}, #{price})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM slaughter_records
(ear_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR destination LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
